Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

is there a worldwide conspiracy to control all of us?

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-08-27 · 24 answers
as believed by some?
New World Order refers to a conspiracy in which a powerful and secretive group is claimed to be conspiring to eventually rule the world via an autonomous world government, which would replace sovereign states and other checks and balances in world power struggles.
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_World_Order_%28conspiracy%29
user [2] · 2007-08-27
credit card to pay everything, then chip implants, then south/north America global market, european union (done) asia/pacific market, as steps towards world government.
american bankers initiated all this by taking control of the money issuing.
global warming propaganda is strategy to curb the development of the emerging third world and establishing nuclear energy.
world domination occurs without clear signs or notices, but it is occurring.

user [153] · 2007-08-28
"actually it is a fact. the united nations is barking like dogs; what have they done?
any sane man can understand that after thirty years they are still barking."
letter to jayapataka, 6 june 1976

"power hungry politicians are creating havoc everywhere. these rascals create so many difficult situations. the public is very nice, but the politicians keep them in ignorance. i have studied the whole world. human nature is the same everywhere.
the mass of people are very good, but these rogues create by their personal aggrandizement so many difficulties."
letter to atreya rsi, 20 april, 1977

user [13] · 2007-08-28
What do I think? I think that a pure devotee cannot be killed - he is protected by the Lord.
user [2] · 2007-08-28
[quote][cite] sitapati:[/cite]What do I think? I think that a pure devotee cannot be killed - he is protected by the Lord.[/quote]
sounds over-simplistic to me. I probably can find many examples of pure devotees killed by demons. Krishnas protection does not mean material protection necessarily, but we love to think so cause we are scared of suffering and death. Back to the question is probable that biggest demons have a plan to complete take over.
user [140] · 2007-08-28

user [140] · 2007-08-28
nix that last question...duh.
user [13] · 2007-08-28
mare krishna rahke ke, rahke krishna mare ke:

"If Krishna wants to kill you, no-one can save you. If Krishna wants to save you, no-one can kill you."

"O son of Pritha, those who are not deluded, the great souls, are under the protection of the divine nature."
Bhagavad-gita 9.13

As we see with Prahlada Maharaja, one who is under the protection of the Lord lives at His disposition.

To say that the Illuminati killed Prabhupada is over-simplistic. It may be a preaching tactic, but its not philosophically correct.

As Voddie Baucham puts it: "My God isnt up there going: Oh, I really wanted to save you, but the big bad Illuminati didnt let me."

Srila Prabhupada left his body according to the will of the Lord, at the time that was ordained for him to do so.

Anyway, quote some sastras and lets examine examples of pure devotees killed by demons.

Is there a worldwide conspiracy to control all of us?

It is Kali-yuga, when the world IS controlled by the demons, what else would you expect? However, YOU do not have to be controlled by them.

is there a worldwide conspiracy to control all of us?
